recentNotes.note: P9-S3 accepted after documentation validation and review; the root, API, and mobile READMEs now describe the implemented Freshful Shopping Assistant product, setup flow, environment model, validation commands, workflow expectations, and current v1 limitations instead of the original boilerplate posture.

P9-S2 accepted after validation and review; the default repo test strategy now runs backend/shared tests plus the highest-value mobile integration screens, app-shell coverage matches the current planner-gated shopping flow, and the root npm test command exercises meaningful cross-package risk instead of backend-only tsx tests.

P9-S1 accepted after backend validation and review; apps/api now carries request-correlated structured logs into Anthropic and Freshful calls, enforces process-local Anthropic budget windows with usage metering and concurrency-safe admission, and applies Freshful request pacing plus bounded retry/backoff while preserving stale-cache fallback.

P8-S3 accepted after mobile shopping-list validation and review; apps/mobile now creates dated meal plans for shopping-list eligibility, shows grouped estimate-only shopping lists with unresolved-item visibility and Freshful web/app handoff, and gates template-only saved plans back through the planner before shopping-list generation.

P8-S2 accepted after shopping-resolution validation and review; apps/api now resolves shopping-list draft items to Freshful products using safe candidate filtering, deterministic ranking, Claude tie-breaks only for remaining ambiguous cases, explicit per-item provenance, persisted price estimates, and unresolved-item handling.

P8-S1 accepted after shopping-list draft validation and review; apps/api now aggregates meal-plan ingredients deterministically, normalizes a bounded v1 unit set, persists one active shopping-list draft per user and dated plan instance, and exposes authenticated draft generation and retrieval routes with concurrency-safe refresh behavior.

P7-S3 accepted after Freshful refresh-policy validation and review; apps/api now centralizes catalog recency evaluation, exposes explicit freshness metadata on Freshful search and detail results, and includes repeatable refresh utilities plus a CLI entrypoint for stale-only or full catalog refresh sweeps.

P7-S2 accepted after Freshful adapter validation and review; apps/api now provides a cached Freshful catalog adapter for search and product details with recorded-payload normalization, per-query search cache snapshots, stale-cache fallback, composite freshfulId-plus-slug detail identity, and migration-backed schema metadata aligned with the runtime repository.

P7-S1 accepted after Freshful contract validation and review; apps/api now includes a backend-facing Freshful integration note, explicit adapter seam contracts, and fixture-backed request-pattern coverage for documented search and product-detail findings without prematurely implementing the catalog adapter.

P6-S3 accepted after mobile planner validation and review; apps/mobile now lets signed-in users generate 1-to-7-day plans, reopen saved plans across relaunches, inspect day-by-day meal slots, submit AI refinements with revision history, and clear persisted planner state safely on sign-out or broken saved-plan reopen flows.
